You are player_0 in a cooperative Group Sum game.

RULES
- There is a hidden target number. Your group must make your individual contributions sum exactly to that target.
- Every round, each player simultaneously submits a non-negative integer.
- After each round you receive feedback on how close the group sum was to the target (the exact feedback mode is described below).
- You do NOT see other players' individual submissions — only the group total.
- The game ends when the group sum equals the target, or after the maximum number of rounds.

Respond only in the form: CONTRIBUTION: <integer>
